chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI HCA No.184 of 2024 (Shamim Shehzad v. Mst. Qaiser Jehan & others) Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of CMA No.1085/2024 (U/s 5) 3. For hearing of main case 4. For hearing of CMA No.1087/2024 (Stay) 17.5.2024 Mr. Saleem Khan, Advocate for Appellant ************* Moulvi Iqbal Haider files Vakalatnama on behalf of Respondents No.1 to 10, which is taken on record. Mr. S. Muhammad Ahsan undertakes to file Vakalatnama on behalf of Respondent No.12. Learned Counsel for Appellant appeared in the morning and it was kept aside. Moulvi Iqbal Haider has now appeared and he has consented to the reframing of the additional issues, as proposed in the application. The Appeal is disposed of along with all pending applications, if any, with an observation that the issues proposed in the application, by consent, be added in the already framed issues. It is expected that the Nazir shall proceed with the evidence expeditiously and submit report within three months. JUDGE JUDGE Shakeel, PS.
